heading: Cancellation of leases of public lands used as airports made under law in forceMay 24, 1928
label: 1443 Cancellation of leases of public lands used as airports made under law in forceMay 24, 1928
text: With the consent of the lessee, the Secretary of the Interior is authorized to cancel any lease of public lands for use as public aviation fields or airports, made under law in force , and to lease such lands to the lessee upon the conditions prescribed by .May 24, 1928section 1442 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was previously classified to section 213 of former Title 49, Transportation.
